from pyspark.sql.functions import col, lit
from pyspark.sql.functions import *
from delta.tables import DeltaTable
from pyspark.sql.window import Window
import pyspark.sql.functions as F

df_company_silver = df_company.select(
    col("company_sk"),
    col("company_code"),
    col("company_name"),
    col("geography_sk"),
    col("base_currency_code"),
    col("reporting_currency_code"),
    col("industry_type"),
    col("active_flag"),
    col("created_timestamp")
).dropDuplicates()

df_geography_silver = df_geography.select(
    col("geography_sk"),
    col("country_code"),
    col("country_name"),
    col("region"),
    col("default_currency_code"),
    col("created_timestamp")
).dropDuplicates()

df_currency = spark.read.format("parquet").load("abfss://bronze@synendtoenddev.dfs.core.windows.net/dim_currency")
#display(df_currency)

df_currency_silver = df_currency.select(
    col("currency_sk"),
    col("currency_code"),
    col("currency_name"),
    col("decimal_precision"),
    col("created_timestamp")
    ).dropDuplicates()

df_currency_silver.write.format("delta").mode("overwrite").option("overwriteSchema","true").saveAsTable("silver.dim_currency")

df_currency_type = spark.read.format("parquet").load("abfss://bronze@synendtoenddev.dfs.core.windows.net/dim_currency_type")
#display(df_currency)

df_currency_type_silver = df_currency_type.select(
    col("currency_type_sk"),
    col("currency_type_name"),
    col("created_timestamp")
    ).dropDuplicates()

df_currency_type_silver.write.format("delta").mode("overwrite").option("overwriteSchema","true").saveAsTable("silver.dim_currency_type")

df_document_type = spark.read.format("parquet").load("abfss://bronze@synendtoenddev.dfs.core.windows.net/dim_document_type")
#display(df_currency)

df_document_type_silver = df_document_type.select(
    col("document_type_sk"),
    col("document_type_code"),
    col("description"),
    col("created_timestamp")
    ).dropDuplicates()

df_document_type_silver.write.format("delta").mode("overwrite").option("overwriteSchema","true").saveAsTable("silver.dim_document_type")

df_calendar = spark.read.format("parquet").load("abfss://bronze@synendtoenddev.dfs.core.windows.net/dim_fiscal_calendar")
#display(df_currency)

df_calendar_silver = df_calendar.select(
    col("fiscal_date_sk"),
    col("fiscal_date"),
    col("day_number"),
    col("week_number"),
    col("month_number"),
    col("fiscal_month"),
    col("fiscal_quarter"),
    col("fiscal_year"),
    col("month_name"),
    col("is_month_end"),
    col("is_quarter_end"),
    col("is_year_end")
    ).dropDuplicates()

df_calendar_silver.write.format("delta").mode("overwrite").option("overwriteSchema","true").saveAsTable("silver.dim_fiscal_calendar")

df_profit_unit = spark.read.format("parquet").load("abfss://bronze@synendtoenddev.dfs.core.windows.net/dim_profit_unit")
#display(df_currency)

df_profit_unit_silver = df_profit_unit.select(
    col("profit_unit_sk"),
    col("profit_unit_code"),
    col("company_sk"),
    col("business_line"),
    col("active_flag"),
    col("created_timestamp")
    ).dropDuplicates()

df_profit_unit_silver.write.format("delta").mode("overwrite").option("overwriteSchema","true").saveAsTable("silver.dim_profit_unit")

window_spec = Window.partitionBy("account_number").orderBy("source_updated_timestamp")

df_scd = df_source_fa.withColumn(
    "effective_from",
    F.col("source_updated_timestamp")
).withColumn(
    "effective_to",
    F.lead("source_updated_timestamp").over(window_spec)
).withColumn(
    "is_current",
    F.when(F.col("effective_to").isNull(), True).otherwise(False)
)

df_scd = df_scd.withColumn(
    "account_sk",
    F.monotonically_increasing_id()
)

window_spec = Window.partitionBy("cost_object_code").orderBy("source_updated_timestamp")

df_scd = df_source_co.withColumn(
    "effective_from",
    F.col("source_updated_timestamp")
).withColumn(
    "effective_to",
    F.lead("source_updated_timestamp").over(window_spec)
).withColumn(
    "is_current",
    F.when(F.col("effective_to").isNull(),True).otherwise(False)
)

df_scd = df_scd.withColumn(
    "cost_object_sk",
    F.monotonically_increasing_id()
